heading: Appropriations; availability for certain administrative expenses
label: 1470 Appropriations; availability for certain administrative expenses
text: Appropriations for field work of the Department of the Interior shall be available for the hire, with or without personal services, of boats, work animals, and animal-drawn and motor-propelled vehicles and equipment.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 31, Money and Finance, by , , .section 692 of Title 31Pub. L. 97–258, § 196 Stat. 877Sept. 13, 1982
